brief_html: Tells a client about a player's information.
format:
(UINT32) Player Counter
 (UINT8) Player number
(STRING) Player name

(UINT16) Unknown (1)

(UINT16) AF_INET (2)
(UINT16) Port
(UINT32) External IP
(UINT32) Unknown (0)
(UINT32) Unknown (0)

(UINT16) AF_INET (2)
(UINT16) Port
(UINT32) Internal IP
(UINT32) Unknown (0)
(UINT32) Unknown (0)
remarks_html:
Tells a client about a player's information.

The external and internal IP are always zero for the host.

NOTE: This packet needs a better structure in the Format. Until then, you will have to deal with the unorganized fields.
